Research

Measuring the (Un)Faithfulness of Concept-Based Explanations

CVPR 2026
We propose SURF, a principled faithfulness measure for unsupervised concept-based explanations, and show that many state-of-the-art explanation methods are not as faithful as previously reported.

View project →
